title: Vanilla Reflex
description: A mod that allows you to completely change the generation of the world. Vanilla Style.
body:
## A mod that allows you to completely change the generation of the world. 

Mod replaces: Trees, Mountains, Landscape, Colors of trees, Rivers, Lakes and Oceans. 

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/60yRXwOl/images/ac3904f2c907e10d70e8c434ade53b8beb56a618.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/60yRXwOl/images/600aea8bf4d4f9fdb91de33497fa7d5858f2d4ba.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/60yRXwOl/images/7dc98f3fa911dca10c882c32e3c7d0ba5d3b573b.png)


> The mod is under development.
